text.zh: XCON / R1 专家系统 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: XCON-R1 is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: XCON 把专家系统研究转化为可见的工业成功。它以产生式规则构建，根据客户需求、组件约束和装配知识配置 DEC VAX 计算机订单，在商业规模上减少昂贵的配置错误。
text.en: XCON turned expert-system research into a visible industrial success. Built with production rules, it configured DEC VAX computer orders by matching customer requirements, component constraints, and assembly knowledge, reducing costly configuration errors at commercial scale.
